t_ch: 说清楚点，好处是什么？
t_en: Get to the point, what are the rewards?

t_ch: 「你会得到更多…」声音回答，「那些物质上的，与精神上的；可数的，与不可数的。所得将匹配于你的力量，从而…均衡。」
t_en: "You will obtain more..." The voice said, "More of the material, more of the spiritual... more of the countable, more of the immeasurable. What is obtained will be in proportion to your strength, and thus... in equilibrium."

t_ch: 好吧，为了「均衡」。
t_en: Alright, then. For the "Equilibrium."

t_ch: 「均衡。」声音重复。你从那没有感情的语调中琢磨出了一丝赞许，「诸界将因此改变。」
t_en: "Equilibrium." The voice repeated. You detect a hint of approval from that emotionless tone, "It is for this that all worlds change."

t_ch: 空气再度毫无征兆地炎热起来，柔软的清风抓挠你的脚腕：「均衡。」陌生的声音在你耳边低语，「诸界已然改变，因为『均衡』至高无上；试炼会找上你。」它的话音落下时，一切又恢复了正常。
t_en: The air turns hot again without warning, and that soft breeze itches at your ankles. "Equilibrium." An unknown voice whispers into your ear, "The worlds are already changing, for equilibrium reigns supreme. Rest assured, the Trial of Equilibrium will find you." As its voice falls, everything returns to normal.

t_ch: 你胡说，《狸狸周刊》才没有跟什么无良盗版作者合作哩！我们杂志社的法务部门已经进行证据保全，小心我们告你诽谤哩！
t_en: That's slander, furreal! Furbobo Weekly would never work with some shady bootleg author! Our legal department has already secured the evidence! Watch it, or we'll sue you for defamation, furreal!

t_ch: （我们什么时候有法务部门了？）
t_en: (Since when did we even have a legal department?)

t_ch: 要当心了，我们社长有钱有势，在二维市过马路都是横着走的，我就问你怕不怕哩！
t_en: You better watch yourself, our boss is rich and powerful! In Duomension City, the traffic stops for them whenever they cross the road. So tell me, are you scared!?

t_ch: （清清嗓子，表示确实如此）
t_en: (Clears throat, confirming that's true)

t_ch: （清清嗓子，表示与我无关）
t_en: (Clears throat, indicating this has nothing to do with me)

t_ch: 叽哩咕噜的说什么呢，既然不让我进去，那就叫你们社长出来和我当面对质。
t_en: What're you blabbering on about? If you won't let me in, then bring your president out here and let me settle this face-to-face.

t_ch: 你想找社长的话，我就是！
t_en: Looking for our president? That's me!

t_ch: 社长不在，你另寻他处吧！
t_en: The president isn't here. Go somewhere else!

t_ch: 再见！
t_en: Goodbye!

t_ch: 诶…？！你回来，这位就是我们的社长大人！
t_en: Hey...!? Get back here! This is our esteemed president!

t_ch: 是谁在狗叫？
t_en: Who's barking?

t_ch: 是他在狗叫，社长大人！
t_en: He's the one barking, Boss!

t_ch: 豁！你是社长？我以为这狸猫杂志社的社长也是只狸猫，原来是人啊。
t_en: Hah! You're the president? I thought the head of a furbo magazine would be a furbo too. Turns out you're human.

t_ch: 那就好沟通了。我是珠星娱乐下属出版编辑公司的授权IP专员——鸟岛，负责《苍天航路绒绒号》的IP维护业务。请问{TEXTJOIN#254}是贵社下属的论坛吗？
t_en: Great, that makes things easier. I'm Fincher, licensed IP specialist with an IPC publishing subsidiary under Pearluxe Entertainment. I'm responsible for the IP management of Fluffy Across the Blue. May I ask if {TEXTJOIN#254} is a forum operated under your organization?

t_ch: 不错。
t_en: That's right.

t_ch: 哼！那我问你，{TEXTJOIN#254}论坛上的帖子侵犯了我司旗下的授权IP权益，你们是一点都没有审过吗？
t_en: Hmph! Then let me ask you this: those posts on the {TEXTJOIN#254} forum infringe on our licensed IP. Did you seriously not review them at all?

t_ch: 我们必然审过的，你别诽谤！
t_en: Of course we reviewed them. Don't slander us!

t_ch: 是吗？那怎么会有这样的事情发生呢？
t_en: Is that so? Then how did this happen?

t_ch: 什么审不审的，我不知道啊。
t_en: Review? I don't know anything about that.

t_ch: 是吗？那我就不意外会有这样的事情发生了。
t_en: I see. Then I'm not surprised at all that this happened.

t_ch: 现在，请您打开贵社{TEXTJOIN#254}论坛，找到那篇热度高得该死的帖子看一看——
t_en: Now please bring up your {TEXTJOIN#254} forum and take a look at that outrageously popular post...

t_ch: 如此明目张胆的<color=#dbc291ff>《苍天航路绒绒号》的盗版漫画</color>，这合适吗？！
t_en: A blatant bootleg of Fluffy Across the Blue! Do you really think this is acceptable!?

t_ch: id叫作…「高清条形马」？这是什么意思？
t_en: The uploader ID is... "HD_Bar_Colt"? What does that even mean?

t_ch: 大概就是把「我是『模糊二维马』的盗版号」写在脸上的意思吧！
t_en: Probably short for "I'm a bootleg account of Blurry_QR_Colt, please notice me."

t_ch: 画得挺好的嘛！
t_en: The art's pretty good though!

t_ch: 是啊，就是说啊，画得太好了！
t_en: Right!? That's what I thought! Way too good!

t_ch: 我们坚持反对这种洗稿炼画风的行为！这个盗版作者更加不可饶恕！
t_en: We firmly oppose this kind of style-laundering plagiarism! This bootleg artist is absolutely unforgivable!

t_ch: 这不就是原著吗？
t_en: Isn't this basically the original?

t_ch: 错！模糊老师画过的原著我可是一期不落。
t_en: Wrong! I've read every single chapter drawn by Blurry.

t_ch: 这…这不过是画风模仿得很像罢了，可恶，真是神乎其技的盗版手法啊！
t_en: Th—This is just an extremely accurate style imitation! Drats, what devilishly skilled knockoff!

t_ch: 再无话可说…
t_en: I can't even...

t_ch: 删帖，封锁，还是协助本公司起诉这个盗版作者，你们看着办吧。
t_en: Delete the post, incarcerate them, or help the IPC sue this plagiarist author. Your call.

t_ch: （其实…要是能挖过来，给模糊老师当枪手，也不是不能饶恕，得和《狸狸周刊》谈谈条件……）
t_en: (Actually... if we could poach them and have them ghost-draw for Blurry, maybe it's not unforgivable. Might be worth negotiating with Furbobo Weekly...)

t_ch: 有没有一种可能，这真的是模糊老师本人注册的小号哩？
t_en: Isn't there a chance this is actually Blurry's alt account?

t_ch: 你不是IP运营吗？要不直接问问模糊老师呢？
t_en: Wait, don't you work for the IP? Why not just ask Blurry directly?

t_ch: 这种小事，用不着打扰模糊老师！
t_en: There's no need to bother our distinguished author for such a trivial issue!

t_ch: 这要真是老师本人画的，我就当着你们的面，把…键盘吃了！要我说对模糊老师第二熟悉，就没人敢说第一！这「高清条形马」绝对是盗版作者！
t_en: If this really was drawn by the author herself, I'll... eat my keyboard right in front of all of you! If I say I know Blurry second-best, no one dares claim first! This "HD_Bar_Colt" is definitely a plagiarist!

t_ch: 事情一下简单了，打电话吧。
t_en: Well, that makes things easy. Just give her a call.

t_ch: 你说的容易，如果那条形马是盗版作者，你也必须把键盘吃了！
t_en: Easy for you to say! If it is a plagiarist, you eat your keyboard too!

t_ch: 你先打电话哩……
t_en: Just ring her up first...

t_ch: 如果那是盗版作者，我就吃。
t_en: If it's a plagiarist, I'll eat it.

t_ch: 呵呵，看来这键盘已经登上二相乐园必吃榜了！
t_en: Hehe, looks like this keyboard's just made it into Planarcadia's must-eat list!

t_ch: 先别管吃不吃了，打个电话不就好哩？
t_en: Never mind that for now. Why can't you just call them, furreal?

t_ch: 虽然我确实有模糊老师的私人联络方式，但编辑部提醒过我：不到十万火急明天就要下印厂的时候，一定不能打老师的电话……
t_en: I do have Blurry's private contact, but the editorial department drilled it into me: unless we're printing tomorrow and the world is on fire, do NOT call the author...

t_ch: 算了，为了维护我们的版权！豁出去了。
t_en: Whatever, gotta protect our copyright! Gotta go all in!

t_ch: 鸟岛先生拿出手机，拨通了「模糊二维马」的电话……
t_en: Mr. Fincher takes out his phone and dials Blurry_QR_Colt's phone...

t_ch: 嘟～噜噜噜噜噜噜噜噜～～
t_en: Doo... doot-doot-doot-doot...

t_ch: *哈欠*——谁啊？
t_en: *yawn* Who's this?

t_ch: 模糊二维马…还真是二维啊？
t_en: Blurry_QR_Colt... So you really are Blurry?

t_ch: 后置镜头而已啦，没事谁开前置啊？
t_en: This is just the rear camera, duh! Who uses the front-facing one anyway?

t_ch: 我是「狸狸通信」新社长。
t_en: I'm the new president of Furbobocom.

t_ch: 哎呀哎呀，是你啊！
t_en: Oh my, oh my, it's you!

t_ch: 老师！模糊老师！就这个{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}们杂志社经营的论坛上，有个高仿号发布抄袭老师的盗版漫画……
t_en: Blurry! Our great author! This is {NICKNAME}, there's a knockoff account posting bootleg comics that plagiarize your work on the forum run by {F#her}{M#his} magazine...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你都看完了吧，喜欢这个「特别小剧场」吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you read the whole thing, right? What'd you think of this "special skit"?

t_ch: 可爱！很喜欢！
t_en: Adorable! I love it!

t_ch: 好乖好贴心，真是让人愉快的回答，开心得能多画五毛钱。
t_en: Such a sweet answer! Makes me happy enough to draw five more cents' worth.

t_ch: 不太喜欢…
t_en: Not a fan...

t_ch: 你不太坦率嘛，你明明在期待着下一期啊。
t_en: You're not being honest. You're clearly waiting for the next update.

t_ch: 也就一般般吧。
t_en: Pretty mid, honestly.

t_ch: 居然还不够喜欢？明明把你们画得很可爱啊。
t_en: Not enough? I even drew you extra cute!

t_ch: 老师，起诉这个黑心杂志社的事就不劳您操心了，我们珠星娱乐有的是法律武器……
t_en: Blurry, don't you worry about suing this shady tabloid — Pearluxe Entertainment has plenty of legal weapons at our disposal...

t_ch: 起诉什么起诉，那个号就是我本人啊。
t_en: Sue? That account IS me!

t_ch: …什么？！是老师本人？那…别怪我无情了，模糊老师，我必须要起诉你！
t_en: ...What!? That's you!? Then... don't blame me for what I'm about to do. I'm taking you to court!

t_ch: 当时只和珠星娱乐签约了《苍天航路绒绒号》漫画正篇的版权，没说「特别小剧场」也要经过珠星娱乐的许可才能发布啊？
t_en: My contract with Pearluxe Entertainment only covers the main Fluffy Across the Blue comic. Nobody said the "special skit" needed approval, right?

t_ch: 不愧是擅长钻空子的模糊老师，我服了。
t_en: You really are the master of finding loopholes, Blurry. I'm impressed.

t_ch: 倒是你啊，鸟岛先生，居然没有认出{NICKNAME}就是球棒浣熊本人。你真的有看过《苍天航路绒绒号》吗？
t_en: But you, Mr. Fincher, how did you fail to recognize that {NICKNAME} is the Baseball Raccoon? Have you actually read Fluffy Across the Blue?

t_ch: 老师，我…不是你想的那样……
t_en: Miss, I... It's not what you think...

t_ch: 鸟岛先生，其实我正在考虑换一个IP运营专员了，请问贵司有合适的人选吗？
t_en: Mr. Fincher, I'm considering switching agents. May I ask if your company has suitable candidates?

t_ch: 该及时按结束键了！
t_en: Time to hang up!

t_ch: 该给我精神损失费了。
t_en: Time to make him pay for your emotional damage.

t_ch: 也从鸟岛先生的奖金里扣吧！
t_en: And dock it from Mr. Fincher's bonus too!

t_ch: 开玩笑的，我多画几篇，你们不会亏的。
t_en: Just kidding. I'll draw a few more chapters for you guys. You won't lose out.

t_ch: 那，拜拜，{NICKNAME}，<color=#dbc291ff>期待我下次的更新</color>吧，拜拜咯……
t_en: Well then, see ya, {NICKNAME}! <color=#dbc291ff>Look forward to my next update</color>, okay? Bye now...

t_ch: 总觉得…好像认识这位模糊老师。应该…感觉本狸也没有采访过哩，是我的错觉吗？
t_en: I feel like... I've met Blurry before. But I don't think I've interviewed this author. Am I imagining things?

t_ch: 我…你…这……
t_en: I... You... This...

t_ch: 键盘我已经准备好哩，你想吃哪个哩？
t_en: The keyboard's ready. Which key do you wanna try first, furreal?

t_ch: 我…我哪个也不吃！
t_en: I... I'm not eating anything!

t_ch: 我只是感叹，曾经，我也是一个漫画爱好者。自从做了专员，我就再也看不下漫画了，满心只有工作：竟然连我最喜欢的球棒浣熊都认不出来了？
t_en: I'm just... lamenting. I used to love comics. Ever since becoming an agent, it's been nothing but work. I can't even enjoy the medium anymore. I couldn't even recognize the Baseball Raccoon, my favorite character?

t_ch: 再见，{NICKNAME}，我会好好看一遍属于球棒浣熊的篇章的。
t_en: See you later, {NICKNAME}. I'll make sure to reread the Baseball Raccoon's chapters properly.

t_ch: 喂，罗刹，「{RUBY_B#星神}繁育{RUBY_E#}」的事你才说了一半，接着讲嘛，怪有意思的。真稀奇啊，星神也会死？祂们不是无敌的吗？
t_en: Hey, Luocha, you didn't finish telling us about the {RUBY_B#Aeon}Propagation{RUBY_E#}! Keep going — it's interesting. So Aeons can die, huh? Weird, I thought THEY were invincible...

t_ch: 世上没有绝对的无敌，也没有永恒的不朽，这只是凡人视角下的夸张而已。不过「繁育」的陨落，倒确实超越凡人的尺度。祂陨于其祂星神之手。
t_en: There is no true invincibility or immortality in the world — such exaggerations are born of the perspectives of ordinary beings. Nonetheless, ordinary beings could not have orchestrated the fall of the Propagation... That Aeon was slain at the hands of another Aeon.

t_ch: …不明白。都是星神，为啥要打打杀杀呢？
t_en: ...I don't understand. They're all Aeons, why do they want to fight?

t_ch: 你…真的是仙舟人吗？！别的星神不提，「{RUBY_B#「巡猎」的星神}岚{RUBY_E#}」与「{RUBY_B#「丰饶」的星神}药师{RUBY_E#}」的故事，你总该知道吧？联盟的夙愿，不就是消灭星神药师吗？
t_en: You... Are you really from the Xianzhou!? Other Aeons aside, surely you must know the story of Lan and Yaoshi? Isn't destroying the Aeon Yaoshi the Alliance's cherished aim?

t_ch: 当然知道啦！唔，知道一点儿。我整天被我娘监督练剑，没怎么上过学……
t_en: Of course, I know! Well, I know a little. My mum made me practice with swords all day — I didn't really go to school...

t_ch: 那…还是换个话题吧。既然你连巡猎和丰饶的死仇都不清楚，很多事情解释起来太费劲了。
t_en: In that case... let's just change the subject. If you don't know about the feud between The Hunt and the Abundance, I'm afraid there's just too much to explain.

t_ch: 好吧，那我换个话题：这个大盒子里装的是啥？
t_en: Fine, how's this for a subject — what's in the box?

t_ch: 这具白匣子吗？它是「灵柩」，俗名「棺材」，专用于收殓逝者的遗体。
t_en: Oh... this one? It's a casket, more commonly known as a coffin. It's for containing the remains of the deceased.

t_ch: 逝者…你，你不是行商么？
t_en: The deceased... A—Aren't you a merchant?

t_ch: 这也是商旅的一部分工作。在下受了嘱托，要将这具灵柩顺路送回仙舟。呵，对动辄寿抵千年的长生种而言，「死亡」大概是个遥远的概念吧？
t_en: Yes indeed, this is just part of my job. I was asked to deliver this coffin to the Xianzhou. Ah, I'd quite forgotten — for long-life species, death is probably a distant concept?

t_ch: 也不是啦，云骑军人投身沙场，死亡也是平常事。但我们没有用盒子……呃，灵柩盛装遗体的习惯。仙舟人辞别同袍的习俗，是将名字和玉兆供奉在「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的因果殿里。
t_en: Nope. The Cloud Knights spend a lot of time on the battlefield — death is a common occurrence. It's just, we don't put bodies in boxes — uh — coffins... In Xianzhou, people go to the Hall of Karma in the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#} and consecrate the names and jade abacuses of the dead. It's our way of saying goodbye.

t_ch: 而且，狐人和持明各有自己的告别仪式。我见过狐族战士将离世同胞安置在星槎里，任它飘向遥远的星辰——他们管这叫「正首青丘」。
t_en: The foxians and the Vidyadhara have their own ceremonies. Foxian soldiers place their dead in Starskiffs and then let them drift out into the stars. They call it "the Verdantia Returning."

t_ch: 持明嘛，他们…就比较神秘了。听说持明活得久了，又或受伤濒死，会化作一颗珍珠般的蛋，然后以幼子形貌破壳新生……
t_en: As for the Vidyadhara, they're... more mysterious. They say that when a Vidyadhara is very old or has a fatal injury, they turn into an egg that looks like a pearl. When the shell breaks, they come out looking young again...

t_ch: 我娘管持明叫「龙裔」。小时候听娘讲的故事里，持明族还都能化身巨龙哩，也不知是不是真的……
t_en: My mum calls the Vidyadhara "Long's Scions." When I was young, she told me stories of how the Vidyadhara could turn into dragons. I don't know if that's true...

t_ch: 是真的。
t_en: It's true.

t_ch: 只有特殊的持明能化龙。
t_en: Only special Vidyadhara can turn into dragons.

t_ch: 传说罢了。
t_en: It's just a legend.

t_ch: 好家伙，「闷葫芦」先生开腔啦。
t_en: What do you know? Silent but deadly speaks.

t_ch: …令堂说的不错，持明是「龙裔」，亦即星神「{RUBY_B#龙}不朽{RUBY_E#}」的后代。因此持明之中，曾经是有人能化龙的，却不是人人都有此资质。
t_en: ...Your mother is right. The Vidyadhara are Long's Scions. They are descendants of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Long}Permanence{RUBY_E#}. That was why some, but not all, could turn into dragons.

t_ch: 这份力量是珍稀之传，必须经由繁多的仪式和考验方能承接。对接掌者…也难说是幸事。
t_en: The power was a rare inheritance, passed down only to those who could successfully complete numerous rites and challenges. For the inheritor, it was hard to say whether it was a blessing or a curse.

t_ch: …我听说过「不朽的龙」和其子裔的故事。许多神话故事都称颂祂拥有完满不朽的生命。
t_en: ...I've heard the story of Long the Permanence and THEIR descendants. Many myths and legends praise the Aeon for a rich and immortal life.

t_ch: 但不知为何，祂在群星间消失无踪，就像从未存在过一般——只留下了孑遗子嗣。
t_en: But for some reason, the Aeon disappeared among the stars without a trace — almost as if THEY had never existed... leaving only THEIR descendants.

t_ch: 天年有尽，但凡生命皆有定数的极限。即便星神也难称不朽，终会抵达逝去的那一刻吧。
t_en: Every life has its limit. Even the Aeons are not truly immortal and will eventually reach the end of their lives.

t_ch: 呃，我多嘴问一句……棺材里的人，你认识么？
t_en: Uh, let me ask you one more question... Do you know the person in the coffin?

t_ch: 认识。
t_en: Huh... Yes.

t_ch: 朋友？
t_en: Friend?

t_ch: 不是。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 那…呃，恋人？
t_en: So, uh... a sweetheart?

t_ch: 哈哈，姑娘想哪儿去了？棺中躺着的与我非亲非故，仅有一面之缘。巧合之下答应了别人，只好走这一趟罢了。
t_en: Haha, miss, whatever gave you that impression? The individual in the coffin is neither friend nor relative — we met only once. By chance, I made someone a promise, and so I have to run this errand.

t_ch: 就聊到这儿吧？诸位休息得也差不多了。
t_en: Let's leave it at that, shall we? I think we've all had enough rest.

t_ch: …是魔阴身。
t_en: ...mara-struck.

t_ch: 好像有人受伤了！
t_en: It looks like someone's hurt!

t_ch: 等等！别轻举妄动。
t_en: Wait! Let's think before we act.

t_ch: 「闷葫芦」、罗刹，咱们一起上，速战速决搞定这些家伙，救下那个女孩！
t_en: Silent but deadly, Luocha, let's charge in together. If we take them out quickly, we can rescue the girl!

t_ch: 之前不是说都交给你就好吗？
t_en: What happened to "us letting you handle it"?

t_ch: 我、我这是双拳难敌四手呀！拜托啦，事成后，我给你俩颁发「见义勇为」奖！
t_en: I—I've only got two hands! Please — I'll wangle you a prize for your bravery or something when it's all over!

t_ch: 别磨蹭了，上吧！
t_en: Enough, let's go!

t_ch: 姑娘，你没事吧？
t_en: Miss, are you okay?

t_ch: …明知故问。
t_en: ...What do you think?

t_ch: 啊…抱歉，我没瞧着血迹，还以为没事…原来你是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}机巧偃偶{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Ah... Sorry, I didn't see any blood, so I thought you were okay... You're a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 运动机杼坏了，动不了。
t_en: My motor is broken — I can't move.

t_ch: 你是云骑军？…很好，请送吾去地衡司。
t_en: Are you a Cloud Knight? ...Good. Take me to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 啊这…
t_en: I, ah...

t_ch: 罗刹，闷葫芦，不好意思，可能咱们又得耽搁一下了…这姑娘是属于「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的偃偶判官，我身为云骑，得优先配合她的指示。
t_en: Luocha, silent but deadly, I'm afraid we have to delay things again... This lady is one of the judges of the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#}. As a Cloud Knight, I must prioritize her orders.

t_ch: 抱歉…早知道不让你俩跟我走了，你们要是自己走，没准都到了……
t_en: I'm sorry... If I'd known I wouldn't have got you to come with me. You'd probably be there by now if you'd gone by yourself...

t_ch: 在下略懂医术，不妨让我试试能否医治姑娘的伤势。
t_en: I happen to have some medical knowledge — perhaps I can treat the young lady's injuries.

t_ch: 呃，你不知道啦，她是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}偃偶{RUBY_E#}。咱们还是把她送去地衡司吧？
t_en: Well, it's just... she's a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}. I think we should just take her to the Realm-Keeping Commission?

t_ch: 不要紧，素裳姑娘——交给我吧。
t_en: Don't worry, Miss Sushang — leave it to me.

t_ch: 应该不疼，但会有些奇怪的感觉……或许酸，或许麻，可以忍住不动吗？
t_en: You might get an aching or numbing sensation, but it shouldn't be too painful... Do you think you can hold still?

t_ch: 没用的…吾身是机巧工造之物，并非血肉凡胎——
t_en: It won't work... My body is mechanical, not flesh and blood—

t_ch: 机巧也好、血肉也罢…都不过是有形之物。只要姑娘不介意我用的手段……
t_en: Be it mechanical or organic, we're still dealing with composite substances. I just hope you'll tolerate my methods...

t_ch: …神奇。
t_en: ...Curious.

t_ch: 你、你是怎么做到的——这根本不是医术吧！
t_en: H—How... What kind of "medical knowledge" is this!?

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#星神}丰饶{RUBY_E#}」……
t_en: The {RUBY_B#Aeon}Abundance{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 很好，不必回地衡了，任务继续。
t_en: Very good — we no longer need to return to the Realm-Keeping Commission. The mission continues.

t_ch: 按「十王司」律条，吾身为判官，不牵外缘。但你们助吾脱身，吾便规劝一句：趁早离去。
t_en: As a judge in the employ of the Ten-Lords Commission, I am forbidden from interfering in the affairs of outsiders. However, seeing as you came to my aid, a word of advice: Leave as soon as possible.

t_ch: 吾到此是为正本清源，捉拿要犯——星核猎手。此人剑技非凡，手持神兵，危险至极。
t_en: I came to address the root of our crisis by arresting a fugitive — a Stellaron Hunter. This villain possesses exceptional swordsmanship and wields a divine weapon — they are extremely dangerous.

t_ch: 若不是遭遇了奇异变故，吾的「阳寿」也许就此折损了。
t_en: If it hadn't been for a strange accident, my wakespan might have been cut short.

t_ch: 奇异的…变故？
t_en: Strange... accident?

t_ch: 随吾来。
t_en: Come with me.

t_ch: 吾还没见过这样的景象呢。
t_en: I've never seen anything like it.

t_ch: 与此同时……
t_en: In the meantime...

t_ch: 呃，这次是个意外。
t_en: Uh. It's an accident this time.

t_ch: 之前「位面」功能做的不错，我们几个就各用这个功能擅自做了点实验…结果每个都给系统代码捅了点篓子。
t_en: The "Plane" function worked pretty well last time, so each of us used this function to experiment a little... and we all made some mistakes in the system's code.

t_ch: 捅了篓子？
t_en: Mistakes?

t_ch: 你们几个？
t_en: Each of you?

t_ch: 我，阮•梅，螺丝咕姆，斯蒂芬。我没管他们做了些什么。
t_en: Me, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, Stephen. I don't care what they did.

t_ch: 反正给代码造成了一点小小的创伤，无伤大雅的事！但…这些代码漏洞正在宇宙里疯狂膨胀，让其中的东西都变成了<color=#dbc291ff>「无尽」</color>！
t_en: We just damaged the code a little. Just a little! But... these bugs in the code are expanding like mad in the universe, and everything in it became <color=#dbc291ff>"Endless"</color>!

t_ch: 你自己进去吧，看看就知道了。
t_en: Just go in there yourself. You'll know what I mean.

t_ch: 「嗯，我对银河大乐透动了点手脚，想靠它多获取点宇宙里的奇物。」黑塔敷衍地解释着，「我的初衷有问题吗？只不过现在收拾不了了…靠你了，{NICKNAME}。」
t_en: "Well, I made some edits to the Cosmic Big Lotto and wanted to use it to get more Curios from the universe." Herta explains half-heartedly. "My intent was perfectly fine. I just... can't fix it myself anymore... It's all up to you, {NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 你动了什么手脚？
t_en: What did you edit?

t_ch: 你只是懒得自己收拾吧。
t_en: You don't wanna fix it.

t_ch: 「没有的事。」黑塔的视线游移着，似乎在回避事实。
t_en: "No way." Herta's eyes are shifting around, seemingly trying to deny the truth.

t_ch: 「总之，现在它不会被损毁了。」黑塔讥笑着指出了问题，「你试试呗，可以获得<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的奇物</color>——帮我多弄点来！最多损失点血量而已，反正是模拟宇宙，又不会真的被炸晕。行就这样，拜。」
t_en: "Anyways. It can't get destroyed anymore." Herta snickers and points out the issue. "Why don't you give it a go? You can get <color=#dbc291ff>endless Curios</color> — and help me gain even more! The worst that can happen is you losing HP. It's the Simulated Universe anyway. Not like you'll actually get blown up. Anyways, that's all. Bye."

t_ch: 「我突然有了个绝妙的点子。」黑塔突然现身，「上一次，螺丝不是说模拟宇宙的存储功能还需要迭代吗？我们反而可以利用这次代码的漏洞，验证现在『内存』的极限！」
t_en: "I suddenly had a brilliant idea." Herta suddenly pops up. "Didn't Screwy say last time that the Simulated Universe's storage function still needs iterating? We can actually use the code errors this time to verify the limit of the current 'RAM'!"

t_ch: 「我想看看你的数据可以疯狂<color=#dbc291ff>『膨胀』</color>到什么地步，{NICKNAME}！」黑塔饶有兴致，「我要把你的丰功伟绩都存档下来！放心，我会给你报酬。」
t_en: "I want to see how crazy the <color=#dbc291ff>memory leak</color> can get with your data, {NICKNAME}!" Herta is interested! "I am going to save all of your glorious achievements! Rest assured. I'll reward you."

t_ch: 我还可以存档？
t_en: I can save?

t_ch: 「打个比方而已，差不多这个意思吧。」黑塔不屑地说，「模拟宇宙可不是游戏。别告诉斯蒂芬•劳艾德，不然他听到『存档』二字八成就会开始兴奋…这家伙什么游戏模式都想做！」
t_en: "It's just an example. Something like that." Herta dismisses the notion. "The Simulated Universe is not a game. Don't let Stephen Lloyd hear you, otherwise he'd get excited just from hearing the word 'save'... That guy wants to make every game mode under the sun!"

t_ch: 「新的切片。」阮•梅的形象翕动着，闪烁着柔和的光晕，「嘘，{NICKNAME}，别告诉黑塔我们在这里做了些什么。」
t_en: "A new world slice." Ruan Mei's figure flutters and shines with a gentle sheen. "Shhh, {NICKNAME}, don't tell Herta what we are up to here."

t_ch: 我们能做些什么？
t_en: How can we help?

t_ch: 我会保守秘密的。
t_en: I will keep this a secret.

t_ch: 「奖励。」阮•梅眨了下眼睛，抿着嘴角笑了，「在这里<color=#dbc291ff>你一定会遇到我的切片</color>。感谢你为我的培育切片做的付出，这是一个纯粹的馈赠——为了我们的『以后』。」
t_en: "A reward." Ruan Mei blinks and gives a closed-mouth smile. "<color=#dbc291ff>You will always encounter my world slice</color> here. Thank you for your contribution to my nurturing slice. This is simply a gift — A gift for our 'future'."

t_ch: 「又没抓到斯蒂芬•劳艾德露面。」黑塔摊手，「看来他是对升级做的实验——这个游戏小狂人，心里只想着玩游戏迅速升级了！现在，<color=#dbc291ff>祝福正在无尽升级</color>！」
t_en: "I failed to catch Stephen Lloyd's face reveal. Again." Herta shrugs. "Seems like he experimented on leveling up — That mad gamer is only thinking about leveling up quickly in this game! And now, <color=#dbc291ff>Blessings are leveling up endlessly</color>!"

t_ch: 「尊敬的{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。」螺丝咕姆的形象出现了，他深深地鞠了一躬，「我本想撰写代码收集#64原始博士的博士之袍，用以吸引他于模拟宇宙中现身。然而没想到代码错误推演出了『纯美之袍』…接着，它与宇宙碎片产生了奇妙的化学反应。」
t_en: "Dear {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}." Screwllum's figure appears, and he gives a deep bow. "I was originally intending to write a code that collects The Doctor's Robe, property of Dr. Primitive, #64 of the Society. I hoped to use that to lure him into appearing in the Simulated Universe. However, the erroneous code generated the Robe of The Beauty instead... and then a wondrous chemical reaction occurred with the Cosmic Fragments."

t_ch: 「事实：我仍未能参悟『纯美』与宇宙碎片之间的联系。」螺丝咕姆彬彬有礼，「结论：<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片正在无尽膨胀</color>。」
t_en: "Fact: I am still unable to comprehend the connection between the Beauty and Cosmic Fragments." Screwllum is extremely polite. "Conclusion: <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments are expanding endlessly</color>."

t_ch: 「斯蒂芬•劳艾德！小天才捅的篓子也比别人多，不错噢。」黑塔讥笑着，「我猜他是对碎星芳饵动了点手脚，这东西可以用来吸引宇宙中的古兽——没想到，现在吸引到了<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的扑满</color>！」
t_en: "Stephen Lloyd! That little genius made more problems than other people. Not bad." Herta snickers. "I'm guessing he did something to the Shattered Star Bait. It can be used to attract cosmic Leviathans — But it ended up attracting <color=#dbc291ff>endless numbers of Trotters</color>!"

t_ch: 「你来了。」阮•梅的声音不起波澜，她对你的到来毫不意外，「这是我们的『秘密』空间，依旧的，请别告诉黑塔…它会在一定时间后彻底销毁。」
t_en: "You're here." There isn't a single hint of emotion in Ruan Mei's voice. She seems unsurprised by your arrival. "This is our 'secret' space. Just as it used to be, please don't tell Herta... it will self-destruct after a certain amount of time."

t_ch: 「培育数据发生膨胀，很神秘的现象。处理起来并不棘手，但…我不知道『秘密』还能藏多久。」她抿嘴，歪头温婉一笑，「感谢你的到来，为我又带来些有效数据。现在让我给你些奖励——为了我们的『以后』。」
t_en: "The cultivated data has seen some unusual expansion. It's quite mysterious. It's not difficult to handle, but... I don't know how much longer this 'secret' can remain hidden," she pouts, tilts her head, and smiles gently. "Thank you for coming. You've brought me some valuable data again. Now, let me give you some rewards — for our 'future'."

t_ch: 「不过…你记得『不免费』，对吧？」
t_en: "However, you remember my help 'doesn't come for free', right?"

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，看得见我说话吗？如果看见了，就随便点一下屏幕——
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you see this message? If you do, just {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} anywhere on the screen —

t_ch: 很好，别担心，你的行动权限暂时被我锁了，先听我解释一下：
t_en: Very well. Don't worry. I've temporarily revoked your activity permissions. Let me explain.

t_ch: 你的身体还在办公室里，这里是根据记忆生成的模拟宇宙，现在，试着随便走走。
t_en: Your body is still sitting in the office. This is a Simulated Universe generated from your memories. Now, try to walk around.

t_ch: 瞧，和现实中没区别。你可以自由行动了。找几个怪物打打，做点符合命途的事情。让我看看你会先把哪个模拟星神引来。
t_en: See? It's no different from reality. You can move around now. Find some monsters to fight. Do something in line with a Path. Let me see which simulated Aeon you'll attract first.

t_ch: 我把那两个小朋友预加载进来了，{NICKNAME}，不用孤军作战啦。我人不错吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I pre-loaded those two kids so you don't have to fight alone. How very kind of me, no?

t_ch: 对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……
t_en: Yes, just stand there and the computer will read your brainwaves, then automatically generate an immersive simulated experience...

t_ch: 一声隆隆巨响从天际传来，在模拟宇宙回荡，久久不绝。你抬头上望，只见琥珀色的天空之上，是一尊巨大的无头巨像。眨眼间，巨像消失了，仿佛刚刚的一切只是你的幻觉，只有低低的响声仍在空气中激荡。
t_en: A loud rumbling sound descends from the sky, echoing endlessly within the Simulated Universe. You look up and a gigantic, headless colossus could be seen in the amber-colored sky. In the blink of an eye, the colossus disappears as if everything was an illusion, leaving only faint echoes rippling through the air.

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「居然是克里珀。」</color>黑塔的声音突然在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「真让我意外，本来以为第一个会是阿哈呢。你的行为符合存护命途吗？我觉得你俩只有不说话这点比较像。」</color>她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，<color=#dbc291ff>「好吧，至少你证明了自己确实能吸引星神。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"So it's Qlipoth."</color> You suddenly hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"What a surprise. I thought the first one would be Aha. Do your actions align with the Path of Preservation? I thought the only thing you two have in common is not talking a lot."</color> You can't tell why she is giggling. <color=#dbc291ff>"Well, at least you proved that you really can attract Aeons."</color>

t_ch: 那是什么…
t_en: What was that?

t_ch: 吸引星神？
t_en: Attract Aeons?

t_ch: 黑塔啧了一声，好像觉得你的疑惑毫无意义：<color=#dbc291ff>「那是『存护』的星神，名为克里珀的太空巨像。当然啦，你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩。」</color>她闷闷不乐地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「——其实模拟星神也一个德行。所以我们找你来当诱饵，好找到和祂们联络的途径。」</color>
t_en: Herta tuts, as if your suspicions are utterly meaningless.<color=#dbc291ff>"That's the Aeon of Preservation, the space colossus known as Qlipoth. Well, what you saw was the simulated entity that Ruan Mei and Screwllum had meticulously nurtured. The real Aeons would pay no attention to us."</color>She continues sullenly,<color=#dbc291ff>"Actually, the simulated Aeons are not much better than the real things. That's why we're using you as bait to try to find a way to communicate with THEM."</color>

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「要记得：你在模拟宇宙中的身份是『开拓』的阿基维利，如果你不知道怎么扮演祂，那就尽量少说话，多提问。我希望你首先认识这群星神，接着和祂们搞好关系，最后从祂们嘴里把我们关心的那点秘密全掏出来。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Remember, your identity in the Simulated Universe is Akivili of Trailblaze. If you don't know how to act like THEM, then talk less and ask more questions. I hope you can get to know these Aeons first, get on well with THEM, and ultimately drag all THEIR secrets out of THEM."</color>

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「不过看起来还有蛮长的路要走……」</color>黑塔说着，叹了口气，<color=#dbc291ff>「虽然你引来了琥珀王，但祂一句话也没说就走了。继续吧，{NICKNAME}，就这么继续，看看到最后祂会不会主动和你打个招呼。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"But it looks like there's still quite a way to go..."</color> Herta states with a sigh. <color=#dbc291ff>"Even though you attracted the Amber Lord, THEY left without saying a word. Go on then, {NICKNAME}. Continue like this, and see if THEY will go out of THEIR way to greet you again at the end."</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 嗯，至少不算全无收获，你的行为得到了来自命途的认可。『存护』的祝福能让你获得更好的保护。
t_en: Well, at least this isn't fruitless. Your behavior received the Paths' approval. Blessings of Preservation can grant you better protections.

t_ch: 不过嘛，至少这一次你有我的保护，也没什么可担心的啦。选吧。
t_en: But at least this time you'll have my protection, so there's nothing to worry about. Make your choice.

t_ch: 利用「存护」的祝福提升生存能力，再寻找提升战斗力的机会，然后再见一次琥珀王！
t_en: Use Preservation Blessings to increase your survivability, look for opportunities to improve your combat strength, and have an audience with the Amber Lord again!

t_ch: 唉，克里珀没来，我也猜到了——选那个把护盾转化为伤害的祝福吧，咱们走快点。
t_en: Alas, Qlipoth didn't come. I guessed as much — Pick the Blessing that turns Shields into damage, and hurry onward.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我要加快流程了：接下来你要连打三场——模拟宇宙不是这么运行的，但我没什么耐心。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to speed up the process. Now you're going to fight three times in a row. This is not how the Simulated Universe should operate, but I'm running out of patience.

t_ch: 好好地走「存护」命途，行吗？看看能不能让克里珀再出现一回。
t_en: Take the Path of Preservation again, okay? See if we can get Qlipoth to visit once more.

t_ch: 来吧……
t_en: Bring it on...

t_ch: 可恶……
t_en: Darn it...

t_ch: 好吧，祂大概不会来了。
t_en: Well, THEY probably won't come.

t_ch: 抱歉，我暂锁了行动权限——呃，我要跟你道个歉。
t_en: Sorry, I temporarily revoked your activity permissions — Uh, I need to apologize to you about something.

t_ch: 我承认自己有点急功近利了…接下来我不会再干涉系统，你按照自己的心意随便玩吧。
t_en: I confess, I'm a little too eager for success... I won't interfere with the system again. Just play as you like.

t_ch: 克里珀的出现大概只是个巧合…不说了，总之，对不起。
t_en: Qlipoth's appearance was probably just a coincidence... That's it. Anyway, I'm sorry.

t_ch: 战斗结束，你在原地等待，但什么也没有发生。
t_en: The fight is over and you wait in place, but nothing happens.

t_ch: 黑塔？
t_en: Herta?

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 我该做什么？
t_en: What should I do?

t_ch: 好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」
t_en: There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 黑塔？
t_en: Herta?

t_ch: 不是一瞬间的事吗？
t_en: Didn't you say it'll only take a second?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「…祂来了！」</color>你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，<color=#dbc291ff>「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」</color>她的声音突然被拉远了，变成长长的一条音带。你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实。寒气突兀地出现，往你的毛孔深处钻去，一层烟雾飘上你的眼睛——
t_en: "THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words."No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's —" Her voice suddenly drifts off, turning into a stretched sound wave. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal. A cold draft suddenly blows past, drilling deep into the pores of your skin as a layer of smoke flutters before your eyes —

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 在烟雾深处，你看见一个模糊的人影：祂看上去像是由一片片镜子组成的，反射五彩斑斓的光华。光线摇曳，晃得你头晕目眩，而就在模糊成一团的视线中，你看见了…卡芙卡？大雨倾盆。长得很像卡芙卡的女人撑着伞，雨水从伞边似瀑布般垂落。你见过她，可是此刻，她是那么陌生，仿佛这是你第一次与她相见。好奇怪啊，她看上去好像有山那么高……
t_en: Through the layers of smoke, you see a vague figure. THEY appear to be made up of mirrors, a splendid kaleidoscope. The light flickers, making you dizzy and blurring your vision. You see... Kafka? Rain is pouring down. A woman who looks like Kafka is holding an umbrella, and the rain is falling down from the brim of her umbrella like a waterfall. You know who she is. However, right this moment, she seems like a stranger, as though this is the first time you've ever seen her. It's so strange. She looks as tall as a mountain peak...

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 新的记忆涌入你的脑海：一个身披褴褛长衣的怪物，喃喃低语，身躯越来越远；一个皮肤黝黑的男人，在星空的阴影下，他的双眼化作烟雾；一个战士高举长弓，弓矢好似流星，紧追仇敌不放；有着许多张脸的女人向你张开臂弯；一道金色的伤痕；遮天蔽日的虫群；一张你平生见过最美丽的面孔；婴儿的啼哭和放肆的笑声……
t_en: New memories flood into your mind — A monster in a ragged coat, murmuring as its body shifts farther away. A dark-skinned man whose eyes turn to smoke beneath the shadows of the stars. A warrior raises a longbow, arrows streaming after their nemeses like comets. A woman with many faces stretches out her arms to you. A golden scar. A swarm of insects covering the sky. The most beautiful face you've ever seen. A baby crying and giggling with pure joy...

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 记忆的碎片在你眼前闪烁，最后快到来不及辨认。这时你才恍然醒悟：那些并不是你的记忆，而是属于这片宇宙的，从亘古延绵至今的时间切片。「…是你是你吗奋勇者破碎者背叛者…」星神「记忆」向你发出探询：「…我记得你噢列车划过白巨星的轨道噢那道光在银河的星彩终结…」从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。接着，不等你回答，祂消失了。
t_en: Fragments of memories flash before you until they get too fast to be recognizable. That's when you suddenly realize those are not your memories, but frozen moments of this universe since time immemorial. "...is you is that you the brave one the broken one the traitorous one..." The Aeon of Remembrance asks of you. "...i remember you oh the express glide past the white giant orbit oh that beam of light end in cosmos color..." Every syllable THEY utter is connected to the next. Then suddenly, without waiting for your answer, THEY disappear.

t_ch: 我是阿基维利…
t_en: I am Akivili...

t_ch: 浮黎…
t_en: Fuli...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「对。」</color>黑塔兴奋地喊道，<color=#dbc291ff>「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——成功了！比我想得还棒，浮黎几乎是最有价值的星神了，祂知道的事情仅次于博识尊！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yes!"</color> Herta yells with excitement.<color=#dbc291ff> "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you — we did it! This is even better than I could've hoped. Fuli is basically the most valuable of all the Aeons. THEY know almost as much about everything as Nous does! Come on out, {NICKNAME} — I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe so you can stay in there even longer in the future!"</color>

t_ch: 你说不会再干涉系统——
t_en: You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —

t_ch: 你的肚脐眼被钩子拽了一下，整个人翻了个跟头：睁开眼睛时，你已经身处黑塔的办公室中。第一次「模拟宇宙」的体验到此结束。
t_en: It feels like a hook pulled at your belly button and your entire body tumbled in a circle. When you open your eyes, you're already back in Herta's office. Your first experience of the Simulated Universe had ended.

t_ch: 成功了！我得赶紧把这个消息告诉斯蒂芬——{NICKNAME}，你也别愣着，再进去逛逛，试试能不能说上一两句话或者别的什么……
t_en: Success! I have to tell this news to Stephen right away — {NICKNAME}, don't just stand there. Go in and see if you can get a few more words out of them or something...

t_ch: 你应该给我点尊重了。
t_en: You should show me some respect.

t_ch: 噢，你说得对，是我得意忘形了…抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我很尊重你！如果方便的话，请你再进去测试一下。
t_en: Oh, you're right. I got too excited... Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I do respect you! If you don't mind, could you please go in for another test?

t_ch: 你没资格随便指使我。
t_en: You have no right to order me around.

t_ch: 噢，你说得对，是我得意忘形了…抱歉，{NICKNAME}，你做得很棒！如果方便的话，请你再进去测试一下。
t_en: Oh, you're right. I got too excited... Sorry, {NICKNAME}. You did very well! If you don't mind, could you please go in for another test?

t_ch: 好的，我这就去。
t_en: Alright, I'll go now then.

t_ch: 我已经升级了「模拟宇宙」。现在它有更大的内存，可以支持更长的流程。我猜上一局应该挺无聊的，所以我会让斯蒂芬多加点有趣的东西。
t_en: I've upgraded the Simulated Universe — it now has more memory and can support longer sessions. The last round must've been pretty boring — I'll get Stephen to add a few more interesting things.

t_ch: 这部分就是完全为你服务的了，希望你玩得开心！
t_en: This part was made specifically with you in mind. Ready to have some fun?

t_ch: 好耶，我喜欢有趣的游戏！
t_en: Yay! I love fun games!

t_ch: 斯蒂芬也这么说——我不是很懂，但随便啦。更重要的是：奖赏也会增加！
t_en: Stephen said the same thing. I don't really get "fun," but whatever. What's more important is that the rewards will also increase!

t_ch: 不如多给点奖赏来得实际。
t_en: Not as good as adding more rewards...

t_ch: 噢，那是肯定的——毕竟你要花更多时间在这个项目上。
t_en: Oh, but we will — after all, you're gonna be spending more time on this project.

t_ch: 我不信任你们的「有趣」…
t_en: I don't trust the definition of "interesting" around here...

t_ch: 怎么说呢，我也不信任。每次有人跟我说他要做点有趣的事，我就会幻视一堆垃圾。
t_en: What can I say? I don't trust it either. For some reason, whenever someone tells me they're gonna do something interesting, I end up imagining a pile of trash...

t_ch: 所以我更愿意和你谈谈更多奖赏的部分。
t_en: ...so I'd rather talk with you about the added rewards part.

t_ch: 总之，这是一次筹划已久的版本升级：更长的流程，更多的内容，更好的奖励，以及更诡异的难度曲线——所以做好准备，再回到「模拟宇宙」去吧。
t_en: In a nutshell, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe!

t_ch: 我会为你提供更多帮助。
t_en: I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.

t_ch: 对，站在那儿就好，机器会读取你的脑波，自动匹配沉浸模拟系统……
t_en: Yes, just stand there and the computer will read your brainwaves, then automatically generate an immersive simulated experience...

t_ch: 耀眼的白光吸引了你的注意。你望向高空，只见一颗流星划过天际——那是你生平仅见最璀璨的星星，喷薄有如将死恒星的光亮。流星一闪即去，只在你的视网膜上烙下一颗光点，光点中依稀有个人影，可你看不真切。
t_en: A dazzling white light captures your attention. You gaze up into the sky and see a comet streaking across. It is the brightest star you've ever seen, its brilliance as blinding as a dying star's. The comet disappears in a flash, leaving only a spot of residual light on your retina. There is the faint shadow of a person inside the light spot, but you can't really make it out.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「『巡猎』的岚…」</color>黑塔低声说，<color=#dbc291ff>「祂注意到了你，但是…没有停留。」</color>过了一会儿，她补充道，<color=#dbc291ff>「或许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Lan of The Hunt..."</color> Herta whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"THEY noticed you, but... THEY didn't stop for you."</color> After a while, she adds, <color=#dbc291ff>"Maybe THEY only care about THEIR nemesis, the Abundance."</color>

t_ch: 「巡猎」？
t_en: The Hunt?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「一个可悲的神灵，被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」</color>从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过活着就是这样。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"A tragic Aeon bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest."</color> You don't hear any hint of sympathy for the said tragedy in her voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"But that's life."</color>

t_ch: 「丰饶」？
t_en: The Abundance?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「是啊，『丰饶』药师。」</color>黑塔冷漠地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」</color>她玩笑般地补了一句。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yeah, Yaoshi the Abundance,"</color> Herta answers indifferently. <color=#dbc291ff>"The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. THEY would heal everything THEY see, be it as small as an atom or as large as a star system. Perhaps THEY can solve your Stellaron problem for you."</color> She adds sardonically.

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 突然，你感到悲伤。这是在做什么？你为什么在这里？一台巨大的意识机器挟持你的思维，把你带到了遥远的，遥远的宇宙他方。一切都是假的，真相并不存在，冒险毫无意义。悲伤像油脂漂浮在思海之上，很快沉入其中，只留给你巨大的空洞……
t_en: Suddenly, you feel sad. What's this about? Why are you even here? A gigantic machine of consciousness holds your mind hostage and transports you far away into the universe. Everything is false. Truth does not exist. Adventures are meaningless. Tragedy gloats like oil atop a sea of thought, quickly sinking into it to leave behind an enormous void...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「喂！怎么回事——」</color>一个女声说着，<color=#dbc291ff>「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Hey! What's going on — "</color> A female voice is speaking. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey — "</color>

t_ch: 那不重要。脑波是什么？不重要。你不需要知道任何事情也可以活着，就像一棵无知无觉的猴面包树，你吸收养分，成长，然后消亡。生命不就是那样？片刻的欢愉，欢愉之后徒留虚无，日复一日，没有变化，没有未来，没有光亮……
t_en: That's unimportant. What are brain waves? Not important. You can live without knowing anything, just like a mindless baobab tree. You take in nutrients, grow, then die. Isn't that what life is? A moment of elation, after which there is nothing. Day after day, timeless and unchanging, having no future, having no light...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「啊，我懂了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Ah, I get it."</color>

t_ch: 是啊，放弃思考吧。思想是行动的负担，令你在意，令你痛苦。随波逐流的树叶，风中打旋的沙尘，无边无垠的宇宙，那黑洞——黑洞？你好像意识到了什么，思维开始跃动，就像行将溺亡的人儿用力击打水面，你挣扎呼吸。很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。
t_en: Yes, abandon all thoughts. Thoughts are burdens of action. Thoughts make you care and make you miserable. The leaves that drift with the current, the dust particles swirling in the wind, the boundless universe, and that black hole — black hole? You seem to realize something. A thought begins to struggle upward, like a drowning human violently beating against the waters. You fight through everything to gasp a breath. Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「很好，总算回来了，是Ⅸ影响了你。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Very good. You're finally back. IX was influencing you."</color>

t_ch: 怎么回事？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: Ⅸ？
t_en: IX?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「『虚无』的Ⅸ出现了，祂让你觉得一切都没有意义，你差点就要在『模拟宇宙』里当一个植物人了——其实那也不要紧，我可以在现实里唤醒你。但不能每次遇到Ⅸ都来这么一次。」</color>黑塔啧道，<color=#dbc291ff>「这家伙是真的非常虚无，祂让自己无意义到系统都没发现祂出现了的地步，我现在相信Ⅸ能轻而易举地干掉整个宇宙了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"IX the Nihility appeared. THEY made you feel that everything is meaningless, and you almost became a vegetable in the Simulated Universe — Actually, it won't matter. I could've woken you up in reality. But you might not make it if this happens every time you meet IX."</color> Herta sighs deeply. <color=#dbc291ff>"This entity is truly nihilistic. THEY made THEMSELF so meaningless that the system didn't even detect THEM. I now believe that IX can destroy the whole universe with just a single thought."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「振作起来吧，{NICKNAME}，下一次Ⅸ的招数就没那么容易生效了。你很重要，真的，你的生命非常有价值，有很多人爱你。」</color>她毫无感情地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. IX's trick won't be so effective next time. You are important, really — Your life is very valuable, and there are many people who love you."</color> She continues emotionlessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Go!"</color>

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 有一位星神出现在附近，这感觉非常熟悉；能量的漩涡席卷而来，吞没一切，构成你的每个原子都在碰撞中湮灭。燃烧的愤怒与破坏欲望将你撕扯成一道金色的伤口，那既是你的末日，也是「毁灭」纳努克的视线……
t_en: An Aeon materializes nearby, and you recognize the familiar sensation. A vortex of energy approaches you and engulfs everything, annihilating every composite atom of your body in the collision. Burning rage and destructive desires tear you into a golden scar that is both your doom and a glimpse from Nanook the Destruction...

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 痛苦瞬间便结束了。你仿若新生。
t_en: The pain is over in an instant. You feel like a newborn.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「对不起，这是我的过失。」</color>黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，<color=#dbc291ff>「纳努克没见过阿基维利，没想到祂对陌生的星神也这么粗暴，你一下子就被祂分解了。我只好用系统指令还原了一个你。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"I'm sorry. This is my fault."</color> You hear Herta's voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"Nanook has never met Akivili. I didn't expect THEM to be so violent even towards an unknown Aeon. You were disintegrated instantly. I had to use system commands to restore a backup of you."</color>

t_ch: 祂可是「毁灭」啊。
t_en: THEY're the Destruction, after all.

t_ch: 下次请事先提醒我。
t_en: Please warn me next time.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「我知道，我知道。可是事先告诉你，就没法收集有效的数据了。」</color>黑塔不以为然地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。下次见到虚拟纳努克，你会让祂大吃一惊的——祂再也没法伤害你了。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"I know, I know. But if I tell you in advance, there's no way to collect reliable data."</color> Herta says carelessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"I'll ask Screwllum to protect you in advance. Next time you see the simulated Nanook, you'll give THEM a huge surprise — THEY won't be able to hurt you anymore. Well, that's it then. Great job. I'm gonna hang up."</color>
You —

t_ch: 温柔的光雨从天而降，落在你身上轻如亲吻。「丰饶」的药师踏空而来。祂面带笑意，眉眼间蕴藏慈悲，似不忍见你此刻的折磨与痛苦。当祂行走时，一根根荆条生长发芽，开出花来。
t_en: A gentle sprinkling of light falls from the sky like a soft kiss. Yaoshi the Abundance steps out of thin air. With a smile on THEIR face and compassion knitted into THEIR brows, THEY seem unable to bear seeing you suffer in pain. As THEY walk, thorns sprout up and blossom in THEIR wake.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「有情皆有三死，谓之命死、变易死、觉不死。」</color>悲悯的星神轻声道，<color=#dbc291ff>「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？『开拓』，愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」</color>一根荆条缓缓飘来，花叶在你面前绽放，如甘露醍醐，滴落舌尖。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"All sentient beings have three deaths — the death of the body, the death of thoughts, and the death of desires."</color> The merciful Aeon whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans? The Trailblaze, may you give up your burdens, be removed from the cycle of being, and set yourself free from suffering."</color> A thorn slowly floats towards you. Its flowers and leaves bloom before you, and its divine and enlightening nectar falls onto the tip of your tongue.

t_ch: 你的伤痛和疲惫一扫而空……
t_en: Your pain and exhaustion have been swept away...

t_ch: 药师微微一笑，祂的身影远去了。
t_en: Yaoshi smiles and THEIR figure recedes into the distance.

t_ch: 结束。
t_en: Finish.

t_ch: 怎么了？我只回答「模拟宇宙」相关的问题喔。
t_en: What's up? I'll only answer questions about the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 关于「模拟宇宙」项目…
t_en: About the Simulated Universe project...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: Got some questions?

t_ch: 它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
t_en: How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?

t_ch: 哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
t_en: Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.

t_ch: 俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…我们现在模拟出的虚假星神与本质具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。
t_en: The Society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to make this project happen... The false Aeons we have simulated are connected with real Paths, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini gods.

t_ch: 当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
t_en: Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.

t_ch: 你说还有别的合伙人？
t_en: You said there are other collaborators?

t_ch: 嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……
t_en: Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.

t_ch: 有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——噢，他想保密，所以你把他忘了吧。
t_en: There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen— oh, um, he wants to keep it a secret, so... forget about him.

t_ch: 为什么需要我？
t_en: Why do you need me?

t_ch: 唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
t_en: Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a Trailblazer while also receiving a glance from Nanook. So, the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.

t_ch: 要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。
t_en: You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.

t_ch: 所以我们打算另辟蹊径…就找到了你。
t_en: So, we decided on a different approach... with you.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 关于「模拟宇宙」内容…
t_en: About the content of the Simulated Universe...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: Got some questions?

t_ch: 它模拟的是什么？
t_en: What exactly does it simulate?

t_ch: 按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……
t_en: It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...

t_ch: 为什么要设计战斗？
t_en: Why is combat a part of the design?

t_ch: 因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……
t_en: Because combat is the best way to demonstrate which Path one is likely to walk. We can only summon those simulated Aeons we designed when there's a connection to a Path. Those creatures don't have any special powers, but are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...

t_ch: 它会读取我的思想？
t_en: Does it read my thoughts?

t_ch: 当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
t_en: Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 关于「模拟宇宙」奖励…
t_en: About Simulated Universe rewards...

t_ch: 我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
t_en: I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.

t_ch: 测试「模拟宇宙」有什么好处？
t_en: What do I get for testing the Simulated Universe?

t_ch: 从虚拟「星神」那儿弄到的所有情报都是你的——这还不够吗？你知道有人为了被星神瞥一眼都出卖过什么？而你甚至能和祂们面对面说话！
t_en: You can keep all the information you get from the simulated Aeons. Isn't that enough? Some people would sell their firstborn just to see an Aeon! And you will get to speak with THEM face to face!

t_ch: 你说的酬劳应该是真金白银吧？
t_en: I thought you were talking about a financial reward?

t_ch: 呃，这个嘛……我的信用点多到花不完，你真的想要也行，但说实话，那玩意不过是公司随手打的一串数字而已。
t_en: Oh, well... If you want, I am sure I can arrange something. I have more credits than I know what to do with. But honestly, it's just a bunch of numbers the IPC typed up.

t_ch: 我想给你点更务实的东西，能够对你有帮助，你确实用得上的东西。所以形式上可能和你想象的不一样……
t_en: I want to give you something more practical and realistic, something that can really help you. So, it may be different from how you imagined...

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 没什么，回见。
t_en: That's all. See you soon.

t_ch: 别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
t_en: Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: Something the matter?

t_ch: 关于「模拟宇宙」项目…
t_en: About the Simulated Universe project...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: Got some questions?

t_ch: 它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
t_en: How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?

t_ch: 哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。

There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.

t_ch: 有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。他想保密，所以你别外传。
t_en: There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, and resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. He wants to keep things a secret, so please don't leak anything.

t_ch: 为什么需要我？
t_en: Why do you need me?

t_ch: 唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。

t_en: You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.

t_ch: 所以我们打算另辟蹊径，找一个特别的人假扮成某个星神和祂们套近乎，可能神与神之间更容易交流一些。
t_en: So we plan on finding another way by sourcing a special person who can disguise as one of the Aeons. Someone who can get close to THEM. It may be easier for Aeons to communicate directly with Aeons.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 关于「模拟宇宙」内容…
t_en: About the content of the Simulated Universe...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: Got some questions?

t_en: What exactly does it simulate?

t_ch: 按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……

Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...
