t_ch: 它会读取我的思想？
t_en: Does it read my thoughts?

t_ch: 当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
t_en: Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!

t_ch: 好处是，模拟宇宙里不仅有你熟悉的场景，也有你熟悉的人物，所以不会觉得孤独。
t_en: Good thing is, there're familiar scenes and people inside the Simulated Universe, so you'll never feel lonely.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 关于星神…
t_en: About the Aeons...

t_ch: 我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
t_en: I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.

t_ch: 怎样才能让星神出现呢？
t_en: How can we bait an Aeon to appear?

t_ch: 第一个诱饵是你，你假扮星神阿基维利，看看能不能招来几个认识的；第二个诱饵是命途，根据你在战斗中表现出的倾向，对应的命途会产生回响……
t_en: The first piece of bait is you. Pretend to be the Aeon Akivili and see if you can attract a few of their acquaintances. The second piece of bait is the Paths. Based on the combat tendencies you've demonstrated, the corresponding Path should produce a Resonance...

t_ch: 行于相同命途的星神就会被吸引过来。
t_en: Aeons who follow the same Path will be drawn in.

t_ch: 怎样才能和星神交谈呢？
t_en: How can one speak to an Aeon?

t_ch: 那就得看你自己了。阿哈和浮黎大概会主动找你搭话，克里珀和Ⅸ可能不会理你，纳努克也许刚见面就会把你烧成灰……
t_en: That's up to you. Aha and Fuli will probably strike up a conversation proactively, while Qlipoth and IX might ignore you. And Nanook, well, they'll probably scorch you to cinders the second they see you...

t_ch: 不过没事，我们不搞盗梦那一套。就算你在模拟宇宙中死了，现实中也不会受伤。
t_en: But it's okay. It can't hurt you — even if you die in the Simulated Universe, you'll be untouched in reality.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 没什么，回见。
t_en: That's all. See you soon.

t_ch: 别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
t_en: Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!

t_ch: 瞧，你可以自由行动了。我要你扮演阿基维利，先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
t_en: See? You can move around now. I want you to play Akivili and find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.

t_ch: 先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
t_en: Find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.

t_ch: 嗯，进展不错，你的行为得到了克里珀的回响。「存护」的祝福能让你获得更好的保护。
t_en: Mmm, it's going well. Your deeds have been recognized by Qlipoth. The Blessings of Preservation will offer you much better protection.

t_ch: 不过嘛，至少这一次你有我的保护，也没什么可担心的啦。选吧。
t_en: On the other hand, you at least have my protection. So you've got nothing to worry about. Come and pick one.

t_ch: 利用「存护」的祝福提升生存能力，再寻找提升战斗力的机会，然后再见一次琥珀王！
t_en: Use Preservation Blessings to increase your survivability, look for opportunities to improve your combat strength, and have an audience with the Amber Lord again!

t_ch: 唉，克里珀没来，我也猜到了——选那个把护盾转化为伤害的祝福吧，咱们走快点。
t_en: Alas, Qlipoth didn't come. I guessed as much — Pick the Blessing that turns Shields into damage, and hurry onward.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我要加快流程了：接下来你要连打三场——模拟宇宙不是这么运行的，但我没什么耐心。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to speed up the process. Now you're going to fight three times in a row. This is not how the Simulated Universe should operate, but I'm running out of patience.

t_ch: 好好地收集「存护」祝福，行吗？看看能不能让克里珀再出现一回。
t_en: Be sure to collect Preservation Blessings, okay? See if we can get Qlipoth to visit once more.

t_ch: 战斗结束，你在原地等待，但什么也没有发生。
t_en: The fight is over and you wait in place, but nothing happens.

t_ch: 黑塔？
t_en: Herta?

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 我该做什么？
t_en: What should I do?

t_ch: 好一阵沉默，随后是黑塔的叹息：「我还指望祂会出现呢，算啦。我这就关掉『模拟宇宙』，一瞬间的事，你不会有任何感觉。稍后我们在现实里再谈。」
t_en: There is a long silence, followed by a deep sigh from Herta. "I was expecting THEM to appear. Never mind. I'll switch off the Simulated Universe then. It'll only take a second and you won't feel a thing. Let's chat back in reality."

t_ch: 黑塔？
t_en: Herta?

t_ch: 不是一瞬间的事吗？
t_en: Didn't you say it'll only take a second?

t_ch: 「…祂来了！」你的耳边传来黑塔不可置信的说话，「不，不是祂…是另一个*星神*！是——」她的声音突然被拉远，你有种奇怪的感觉，仿佛黑塔的话语凝固了，整个「模拟宇宙」也变得不那么真实——
t_en: "THEY... came!" You hear Herta's stunned words. "No, not THEM... It's another Aeon! It's..." Her voice suddenly drifts off. You have a strange feeling about this, as if Herta's words solidified and the whole Simulated Universe became somehow unreal.

t_ch: 你看见一个模糊的人影：祂由镜子的碎片构成，五官被棱镜反复折射成谜团。无数记忆在你眼前涌现。
t_en: You see a blurry figure made of mirror fragments, and THEIR facial features are repeatedly refracted by the prism to form a mystery. Countless memories spring up before your eyes.

t_ch: 你看到了<color=#dbc291ff>卡芙卡</color>。她的身躯被拉扯、变形，和她手里的伞揉在一起，变成水滴落在你脚边。
t_en: You see <color=#dbc291ff>Kafka</color>. Her body is stretched, deformed, and rubbed together with the umbrella in her hand, turning into water droplets and falling at your feet.

t_ch: 你发现自己是啼哭的<color=#dbc291ff>亚德丽芬婴儿</color>，拥抱脐带还未剪断的胞胎。你记得身上有条<color=#dbc291ff>金色伤痕</color>，金血流淌在消亡星球。你发现自己皮肤黝黑，长袍席卷荒原。你发现你是跨越深渊的<color=#dbc291ff>迅影</color>，伸手揽住流星。
t_en: You find yourself become a weeping <color=#dbc291ff>Adlivun baby</color> with an uncut umbilical cord. You remember that there is a <color=#dbc291ff>golden scar</color> on your body, and golden blood flowing on the dying planet. You find yourself dark-skinned and wearing a robe on the wasteland. You find that you are a <color=#dbc291ff>swift shadow</color> across the abyss, reaching out to catch the shooting star.

t_ch: 接着，祂的声音突然传来——<color=#dbc291ff>「…长袍飘拂包裹游历你张开黑色皮肤你嗤笑探索丝线旋转交叠经纬织成海洋词语…」</color>从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。不等你回答，祂突然消失了。
t_en: Then, THEIR voice suddenly came... <color=#dbc291ff>"...robe flutter wrap travel you expand dark skin you laugh explore thread rotation intertwine coordinate weave ocean vocabulary..."</color> Every word THEY say is connected to each other like a whisper. Before you could say anything, THEY suddenly disappear.

t_ch: 等一下，聊聊卡芙卡嘛。
t_en: Wait, let's talk about Kafka.

t_ch: 祂控制了我的脑子！
t_en: THEY have controlled my brain!

t_ch: 「成功了！」黑塔兴奋地喊道，「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——比我想得还棒，浮黎对我们的研究非常有帮助，因为祂拥有所有人的记忆，知道的东西仅次于{RUBY_B#「智识星神」}博识尊{RUBY_E#}！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」
t_en: "We did it!" Herta yells with excitement, "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you. Fuli is valuable for our research because THEY have the memories of all beings and know almost as much about everything as {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#} does! Come on out, {NICKNAME}, I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe. You need to stay in there even longer in the future!"

t_ch: 你说不会再干涉系统——
t_en: You said you wouldn't interfere anymore —

t_ch: 琥珀色天空传来低鸣。你抬头，这是黄昏。无数铜矿、琥珀与蛋白石从你的面前掉下来。这是一场举世瞩目的矿物质雨。在蒸腾的熔化中，庞大之物从地幔中伸展脊椎，祂宽阔的手掌紧握一柄巨锤。——你睁大双眼，发觉这竟是<color=#dbc291ff>「存护」星神克里珀</color>！
t_en: There is a murmur in the amber sky. It's dusk. You look up and find countless copper ore, amber and opal falling from the sky. This is a wondrous mineral rain. In the steam, the colossal thing stretched THEIR spine from the mantle with a sledgehammer gripped in THEIR broad palm. You opened your eyes and realized that this is actually <color=#dbc291ff>Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation</color>!

t_ch: 黑塔搞的新把戏？
t_en: Is this a new trick by Herta?

t_ch: 角色扮演环节？
t_en: Is this some kind of role-playing?

t_ch: 祂身边发出巨大的轰鸣——祂真的在<color=#dbc291ff>警告</color>你，接着，祂就在你眼前消失了。
t_en: There is a huge roar around THEM – this is a <color=#dbc291ff>warning</color> for you. Then, THEY disappear before your eyes.

t_ch: 「我们的计算成功了，『存护』的星神克里珀真的现身了。」黑塔的声音突然响起，她发出意义不明的吃吃笑声，「『开拓』的星神阿基维利死而复现，引来老朋友了。」
t_en: "Our calculations are correct. Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation, has really appeared." Herta's voice suddenly sounded, and she let out an ambiguous giggle, "The Aeon of Trailblaze, Akivili's revival has attracted an old friend."

t_ch: 可是祂露个面就跑了。
t_en: But THEY have run away.

t_ch: 多给我讲点星神之间的交情故事！
t_en: Tell me more stories about the relationship between the Aeons!

t_ch: 「你看见的是阮•梅和螺丝咕姆精心培育的模拟体星神，真正的星神才不会搭理咱们哩，模拟星神当然也一个德行。我就把你的模拟身份设置成『开拓』星神阿基维利，用来吸引祂们。」黑塔啧了一声，「现在看来我的判断没错，接下来你遇到虚拟星神时，就得跟祂们多套套近乎。」
t_en: "What you saw was the simulated Aeon carefully cultivated by Ruan Mei and Screwllum. The simulated Aeons will ignore us just like the real ones, so I set your simulated identity as Akivili, Aeon of Trailblaze, to attract THEM." With a click of her tongue, Herta says, "Now it seems that my judgment is correct. Next time you run into the Aeons, try to get something out of THEM."

t_ch: 你想套点什么？
t_en: What do you want to know?

t_ch: 你肯定比我更懂八卦！
t_en: You must know more about gossip than I do!

t_ch: 「星神秘史，逸闻，爱恨情仇，或者宇宙起源，什么都行。」黑塔没好气，「你自己想想就是了！」
t_en: "Myths of the Aeons, anecdotes, love stories, the origin of the universe... Anything will do!" Herta was annoyed, "Just think of something!"

t_ch: 奇怪的事情又出现了。寒气浮上你的背脊，朦胧水雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，你很熟悉，又一次。
t_en: The strange thing happened again. A chill creeps up your spine, mist clouds your eyes, and you see the familiar vision appearing again.

t_ch: 这一次，祂更近了——巨大的威慑力扑面袭来。<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」星神浮黎</color>再次出现，祂漂浮在半空，从上空以俯首压迫你。祂…在看着你？你不确定哪个剖面才是祂的眼睛。
t_en: This time, THEY are even closer – you can feel THEIR presence and power. <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance</color>, appears again. THEY float in midair, bowing THEIR head from above. Are THEY looking at you? But you are not sure which section is THEIR eyes.

t_ch: 你告诫自己要清醒……你思考应尽的使命：开口与祂对话。
t_en: You tell yourself to stay sober and complete the mission: Speak to THEM.

t_ch: 好巧啊！又遇到你了。
t_en: What a coincidence! We meet again.

t_ch: 你这家伙怎么做到控制我的脑子的？
t_en: How did you manage to control my mind?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「…混乱变成时间你的失职注定过去体积不再等比例缩小步伐一步两步三尺离开阻止你好自为之艾利欧列车前进婴儿坠地癌症正在长大…」</color>祂听到了你的话。祂缓缓回应，你感到寒气扑在脸上，皮肤上绒毛战栗。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"...chaos become time your dereliction determine past volume no longer proportional shrink steps one step two steps three feet depart prevent you be warned elio express advance baby fall cancer growing now..." </color>THEY respond to you after hearing what you say. You feel the chill on your face, and the hairs on your skin shudder.

t_ch: 接着祂抽身远去，刹那间消失。你终于松了口气。
t_en: Then THEY draw away and disappear in an instant. You feel relieved.

t_ch: 黑塔的声音适时响起：「又遇见浮黎了，进展不错。在你之前的测试者甚至得不到浮黎的回响。」听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。
t_en: You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. "You met Fuli again. Well done. Previous testers never even got a response from Fuli." Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.

t_ch: 原来你还在看着我？
t_en: You are still watching me?

t_ch: 「是啊，是啊，就当是新手福利吧。等你熟悉了『模拟宇宙』，我就不会再频繁打扰你啦，还有那么多事情要干呢，你就自己玩吧。」
t_en: "Yup, sure am. Just treat it as the perk of being a rookie. Once you're familiar with the Simulated Universe, I won't bother you too much. There's so much to get done, so just play around by yourself."

t_ch: 到底哪里升级了啦？
t_en: Just what did you upgrade?

t_ch: 「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」黑塔啧了一声，「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」
t_en: "What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?" Herta snorts. "This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"

t_ch: 黑塔叹了口气：「再往前走一点有个<color=#dbc291ff>下载装置</color>，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」
t_en: Herta sighs. "There's a <color=#dbc291ff>Downloader</color> just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."

t_ch: 不知为何，你突然被吸入黑暗中。这是时空曲率膨胀至极限的重力场，任何物质和光线都无法逃脱。
t_en: For some reason, you are suddenly sucked into darkness. This is a gravitational field where the curvature of space-time expands to its limit, and nothing – neither matter nor light – can escape.

t_ch: 你感到自己正被黑色液体吞没，这是片黑暗之海。声音、嗅觉都被隔绝，一切变得离你很远。
t_en: You feel yourself being swallowed by some black liquid — a sea of darkness. Your hearing and smell are cut off, and everything becomes far away from you.

t_ch: 「喂！怎么回事——」黑塔的声音传来，「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」
t_en: "Hey! What's going on..." You hear Herta's voice. "There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey..."

t_ch: 你伸出手指去探，无法触碰到大量微暗的海。你感到自己像一块油脂，漂浮在悲伤的黑暗海面。
t_en: You stretch out your fingers, but still can't touch the vast, dark sea. You feel like a piece of grease floating on a dark sea of sorrow.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，振作点。我猜『虚无』星神Ⅸ出现了，祂本身就是虚无，系统没法辨识祂出现了。」黑塔说道，「Ⅸ现在离你很近，你的精神被影响了。你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」
t_en: "Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. I guess IX, the Aeon of Nihility, has appeared. THEY are nothingness, so the system cannot detect THEIR appearance." Herta says, "Your spirit is affected because IX is near you. You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Quickly!"

t_ch: 黑塔的声音将你分散的精力拉了回来。
t_en: Herta's voice brings your distracted mind back.

t_ch: 你只关心你的模拟宇宙！
t_en: You only care about your Simulated Universe!

t_ch: 你都不关心我！
t_en: You don't care about me at all!

t_ch: 「是么，我忘记了。」她毫无感情地道歉，「真抱歉，让你不舒服了。再等一会，我再收集点Ⅸ的数据，然后马上把你弄出去。」
t_en: "Yeah, I forgot." She apologized emotionlessly, "Sorry for making you uncomfortable. Give me a sec. I'll collect some more data on IX, and then I'll get you out right away."

t_ch: 你屏气凝神，努力聚集精神。你好像能听到虚空深处不成语调的音节，这是祂的声音。
t_en: You hold your breath and try to stay focused. You seem to be able to hear toneless syllables deep in the void — it's THEIR voice.

t_ch: 你四处张望，看不到祂的实体。但你知道，祂就在附近…也许，就在你耳边…很快，你的精神开始溃散…
t_en: You look around and know that THEY are nearby, but cannot see THEIR presence. Maybe, THEY are right next to your ear... Soon, your spirit starts to break...

t_ch: 「就这样吧{NICKNAME}，再继续你可能撑不住了。」黑塔啧道，「靠近Ⅸ这家伙身边就会这样，祂好像也不是故意的。辛苦你了，干得不错！」
t_en: "Stop, {NICKNAME}. You won't be able to hold it anymore." Herta says, "human minds will break when people get near IX, but IX doesn't seem to do it on purpose. Thank you for your hard work, you did a good job!"

t_ch: 「抬头看看。」黑塔轻声说，「值得期待的家伙出现了。」
t_en: "Look up." Herta says softly, "Someone worth getting excited about has appeared."

t_ch: 你抬头，看到一个身影张开六臂，祂肆意伸展虬美身姿，关节舒张，就像在表演宇宙之舞。
t_en: You look up and see a figure with six arms wantonly stretch THEIR body and bones, as if performing a cosmic dance.

t_ch: 祂的头发如同鹊翎，在千星寰宇中盛开。你想起书中记载人们对星神的遐想——<color=#dbc291ff>「丰饶」星神药师。</color>
t_en: THEIR hair is like a magpie's feathers, blooming in a universe of thousands of stars, which reminds you of people's reverie about the Aeons recorded in the book. It's <color=#dbc291ff>Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance</color>.

t_ch: 「『开拓』，吾因汝之归来而欢喜。」祂用身躯上的万只眼睛注视着你，声音悲悯，像是垂怜。
t_en: "The Trailblaze, I am delighted by your return." THEY stare at you with tens of thousands of eyes on THEIR body, with a voice so sympathetic, as if speaking to you in pity.

t_ch: 听不出你很开心…
t_en: You don't sound happy...

t_ch: 一直盯着我看，我会脸红的。
t_en: Don't keep staring at me, I'll blush.

t_ch: 「有涯之身岂可济渡无涯之海？愿汝弃舍重担，不受后有，解脱自在。」话毕，祂亲吻你，然后离去。
t_en: "How can a body bounded by its limits cross the boundless oceans? May you give up your burdens, be removed from the cycle of being, and set yourself free from suffering." When THEY finish speaking, THEY kiss you and leave.

t_ch: 你愣在原地，十分惊愕，祂如同毒蝎伸出钩尾，对你轻轻一蛰。你看到疯狂场景，万物藤蔓生长不再受控，缠住受馈者，遍地孽物哀啼。
t_en: You freeze in place, terrified. THEY stretch out THEIR poisonous scorpion-like hooked tail, and sting you lightly. You see wondrous scenes flashing before your eyes — vines grow wildly and entangle their beneficiaries, and there are abominations and crying everywhere.

t_ch: 「你没事吧，给点反应？」黑塔不满的声音传来，「算了，这样也行，反正总会再遇到祂。」
t_en: "Are you okay? Talk to me," said Herta with a dissatisfied voice, "well, that's fine. We will meet THEM again."

t_ch: 你身处一片白昼中。你抬头，巨大的身影跨过裂界，身影如王储般英勇。
t_en: You stand in a vast expanse of whiteness and raise your head. You see a tall, valiant figure like a crown prince striding across the Fragmentum.

t_ch: 极亮的恒星风被煽动，你看到祂扬起长弓，接着，祂的身影突然跃至远处——你分明看到祂前来的模样，但一瞬后就只剩祂的背影。
t_en: The dazzling stellar wind wavered. You see THEM drawing a bow, and then THEY suddenly leap into the distance. You clearly see THEM coming, but after a moment, only his shadow remains.

t_ch: 「『巡猎』的岚…」黑塔低声说，「别发呆了，祂在你前头，快喊住祂。」
t_en: "Lan, The Hunt..." Herta whispered. "Don't be in a daze. THEY are ahead of you, hurry up and call THEM."

t_ch: 你发现自己无法动弹——不知何时，祂已将你钉于无形的墙，你甚至没有察觉祂在何时出手。你奋力挣扎，念起祂的名字，开口——
t_en: You find yourself unable to move at all — it's like THEY have nailed you to an invisible wall, and you don't even know when THEY made the move. You struggle, say THEIR name, and...

t_ch: 回合制游戏，你还得接我一招再走。
t_en: It's a turn-based game. You have to deal with me one time before you can go.

t_ch: 你的名字是——岚！
t_en: Your name is... Lan!

t_ch: 祂没有理会——你眨眼间，祂消失了，一切空空如也。
t_en: THEY ignore you and, in the blink of an eye, disappear from your sight.

t_ch: 「别太受挫，下回我把祂的社交属性调高点。」黑塔有些失望，「祂动作太快了。不过，足够我捕捉些祂的数据了。」
t_en: "Don't be too discouraged. I will increase THEIR social attribute next time." Herta was a little disappointed, "THEY move too fast. But I was able to intercept some of THEIR information."

t_ch: 「祂可能和阿基维利不太熟。」过了一会儿，她补充道，「也许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」
t_en: "THEY're probably not very familiar with Akivili." A moment passed. She added, "Perhaps THEY only have THEIR enemy, the Abundance, on THEIR mind."

t_ch: 「巡猎」？
t_en: The Hunt?

t_ch: 「一个可悲的家伙，目前的记载看来是这样。被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，「不过活着就是这样。」
t_en: "A tragic being, according to our record. They are bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest." You don't hear any hint of sympathy for said tragedy in her voice, "But that's life."

t_ch: 「丰饶」？
t_en: The Abundance?

t_ch: 「是啊，『丰饶』的星神，药师。」黑塔冷漠地说，「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」她玩笑般地补了一句。
t_en: "Yeah, Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance," Herta answers indifferently. "The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. THEY would heal everything THEY see, be it as small as an atom or as large as a star system. Perhaps THEY can solve your Stellaron problem for you." She adds jokingly.

t_ch: 你突然跌入漩涡里，抬起头，看到了祂——祂庞大身躯遮天蔽日，躯干有一道巨大的、被划开的创伤，汩汩金血从中流淌。你震栗不已，因为祂的视线瞥向了你——
t_en: You suddenly fall into a vortex. Looking up, you see THEIR huge body obscuring the sky and the sun. There is a huge, open wound on THEIR torso, from which golden blood flows. You tremble as THEIR eyes glance at you...

t_ch: 接着，空气立刻被掀起热浪，痛苦猛烈袭来——你突然意识到，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>死亡来临的瞬间。</color>
t_en: Immediately, the air suddenly heats up, and the pain hits you hard. You realize that this is <color=#dbc291ff>the moment of death</color>.

t_ch: 发生了什么？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: ……嘀……嘀……你的意识已被切断……正被重新接入模拟宇宙……
t_en: ...Beep ...Beep ...Your consciousness has been cut off... Reconnecting to the Simulated Universe...

t_ch: 「你刚被{RUBY_B#「毁灭星神」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}一瞬间就杀死了，连接切断了。」黑塔的声音在你耳边响起，「纳努克没见过阿基维利，是没什么交情，但没想到祂会直接攻击你。」
t_en: "You were disconnected because you just got killed by {RUBY_B#Aeon of Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#} in an instant," Herta's voice rang in your ear. "Nanook had never met Akivili before, so it's understandable that THEY don't know you. But I didn't expect THEM to attack you."

t_ch: 你这家伙也太不靠谱了！
t_en: You're too unreliable!

t_ch: 真的好痛啊。
t_en: It really hurts.

t_ch: 「我知道，我只是忘记提醒了。」黑塔不以为然地说，「下次我会让螺丝咕姆事先做好防护。好，就这样，辛苦你啦，挂了。」
t_en: "I know, I just forgot to remind him," Herta said disapprovingly, "Next time I will ask Screwllum to take precautions. Alright, that's all, thanks for your hard work, bye."
You —

t_ch: 敌人纷纷倒下，你无法控制兴奋情绪。你是天才，你很确信。你的注意力开始溃散，你爱每片叶子的震颤，你享受无穷思维的破坏力，直至你察觉自己的不对劲——这不是你。
t_en: Enemies are falling, and you can't contain your excitement. You are a genius, you are sure of it. Your concentration starts to crumble, you love the shaking of every leaf, you enjoy the destructive power of endless thoughts, until you realize that something is wrong with you — this is not you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「糟糕，祂来了……」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh oh, THEY're here..."</color>

t_ch: 「阿基维利——阿基维利！」一个声音发疯大笑着，「好久不见，甚是想念！」你毛骨悚然，疯子才具有的感染力。
t_en: "Akivili, Akivili!" A voice laughed wildly, "It has been so long, I miss you greatly!" Your hairs stand on end. This is the infectious enthusiasm of a madman.

t_ch: 祂出现在你面前：祂没有头颅，怀抱面具。祂朝你摆手，兀自转圈，手臂悬在半空，肌肉控制指节颤动，姿态如同雕塑。
t_en: THEY appear before you: Without a head and a mask in THEIR arms. THEY waved THEIR hand at you, still spinning in circles, THEIR arms hanging in midair, THEIR muscles controlling THEIR trembling knuckles, and THEIR posture like that of a sculpture.

t_ch: 「我很伤心。」祂突然变得悲伤，「为什么你会死去？」祂痛苦地呜咽，泪水蹭过你的手背，你感到自己真的*死亡*过。
t_en: "I am so sad." THEY suddenly became sorrowful, "Why did you die?" THEY whimpered in pain, as tears ran down the back of your hand. You felt like you really had died.

t_ch: 「你陨落太久，宇宙失去了秩序。」祂开始拍手，「接着，一切开始变得混乱！这就是我想要的！我想拥抱你，<color=#dbc291ff>可惜我是个计算机里的方程</color>。噢，这好像还挺酷的。」祂挠了挠头。
t_en: "You have fallen too long and the universe has lost its order." THEY began to clap THEIR hands, "Then everything started to turn to chaos! This is what I want! I want to hug you, <color=#dbc291ff>unfortunately I'm just an equation in a computer</color>. Oh, that seems kinda cool." THEY scratched THEIR head.

t_ch: 「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」
t_en: "This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."

t_ch: 「我得跟你道歉，真的。我埋伏在你列车上一整年，只为炸掉它和你的无名客。我忍不住，抱歉。」祂愧疚地把手放在胸前，郑重鞠躬。
t_en: "I have to apologize to you, really. I lay in ambush aboard your train for a whole year just to blow it up with your Nameless followers. I couldn't resist, I'm sorry." THEY put THEIR hand to the chest guiltily and bowed solemnly.

t_ch: 「这混账还在装，祂已经发现你不是阿基维利了。」
t_en: "This disgrace is still pretending. THEY've already figured out you're not Akivili."

t_ch: 「你就是阿基维利——你还活着，有趣的对手！请你多耍耍我，那就是我想要的…成长起来，然后打败我！」祂踢着地面发出踏踏声，渐渐离开…你大口喘气，从折磨中逃生。
t_en: "You're Akivili — you're alive and well, what an interesting opponent! Please play with me more, that's what I want... Grow up and defeat me!" THEY kick the ground with a stomp and fade away... You gasp for air as you escape from the torment.

t_ch: 「『欢愉』的星神阿哈。」黑塔没好气地解释道，「非常难捉摸的家伙，祂大概发现自己活在游戏里了。这家伙很聒噪，也很危险。下次捏着鼻子和祂多聊几句吧，辛苦你了。」
t_en: "Aha, the Aeon of Elation." Herta explained uncharitably, "A very elusive one who probably found THEMSELF living in a game. This fella is very noisy and dangerous. Next time, bite your tongue and talk to THEM more, thanks for your hard work."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」</color>黑塔叹气。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun."</color> Herta sighs.

t_ch: 总之，这是一次筹划已久的版本升级：更长的流程，更多的内容，更好的奖励，以及更诡异的难度曲线——所以做好准备，再回到「模拟宇宙」beta测试去吧。
t_en: Overall, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe beta test!

t_ch: 我会为你提供更多帮助。
t_en: I'll help you out some more. Don't worry.

t_ch: 「模拟宇宙」要关闭一阵子了，我们想给系统来一次大升级，顺便看看虚拟阿哈这事怎么处理。下一次你会玩到正式版本的「模拟宇宙」，测试服先废弃了。
t_en: The Simulated Universe will be closed for a while. We want to give the whole thing a big overhaul, and think about what to do with Aha. Next time you will play the official version of the Simulated Universe, the test version will be abandoned.

t_ch: 我没想到阿哈会出现…看来得启用正式版本了。我们得花点时间升级，测试服先废弃了。
t_en: I never thought Aha would show up... Looks like I'll have to deploy the official version. We have to spend some time on upgrading, the test version will be abandoned.

t_ch: 正式版本的「模拟宇宙」！快把之前的测试版给忘了。变化还挺多的，要我给你个更新清单吗？
t_en: The official version of "Simulated Universe"! Forget about the previous beta version. There are lots of changes. Do you want me to give you the patch notes?

t_ch: 正式版本体验怎么样？你要是觉得简单，可以去挑战下个世界。
t_en: How's your experience with the official version? If you find it easy, you can go challenge the next world.

t_ch: 对了，有个模拟宇宙配套的图鉴装置在那边，你要是闲着没事可以去看看，没兴趣就算了。
t_en: By the way, there is a Simulated Universe Index over there, you can check it out if you have nothing else to do. But if you're not interested then forget it.

t_ch: 收集不就是人类的天性吗？
t_en: Is it not human nature to collect?

t_ch: 「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会玩到我们的『模拟宇宙』正式版本。」
t_en: "Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll enjoy our official version of Simulated Universe."

t_ch: 「在你测试的时候。」黑塔回答，「我们有些比公司和博识学会厉害得多的通讯手段，而且，就我们这个智商的人群来说，交流效率很高。」
t_en: "While you were testing," Herta replies. "We have methods of communication far more powerful than those possessed by the IPC or the Intelligentsia Guild. As far as people with our IQ are concerned, this communication is highly efficient."

t_ch: 「大概会来个翻天覆地的大升级吧。」黑塔回答，「螺丝咕姆和阮•梅没什么想法，但斯蒂芬兴奋极了，我估计他以为我们是真心想做个游戏。」
t_en: "Pretty much a complete overhaul of an upgrade," Herta replies. "Screwllum and Ruan Mei didn't think much about it, but Stephen is thrilled to pieces. I bet he thinks we're really developing a game here."

t_ch: 「斯蒂芬•劳艾德提了一堆把『模拟宇宙』做有趣的点子，对于钓星神这件事毫无帮助，不过也许能让你玩得更开心点。」黑塔叹气。
t_en: "Stephen Lloyd has come up with a bunch of different ideas for making the Simulated Universe more fun. It won't help us attract more Aeons, but it might just help you have more fun." Herta sighs.

t_ch: 喂，图鉴装置在右边，别迷路了。
t_en: Hey, the Index is on the right. Don't go the wrong way.

t_ch: 它没准能给你测试模拟宇宙带来一些帮助和动力…但也可能有点多余，我说不好。
t_en: It may help and motivate you with your test of the Simulated Universe... But it could also be a bit redundant. Well, I'm not sure.

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
t_en: Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.

t_ch: 「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，「你可以在我这<color=#dbc291ff>强化祝福</color>，至于其他功能，你在房间里自己找找。」
t_en: "This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here." Herta says irresponsibly. "You can <color=#dbc291ff>Enhance Blessings</color> with me, and as for the other functions, you can find them in the room itself."

t_ch: 「嗯，嗯。」黑塔敷衍地应和，「作为游戏的管理员，我有权将你的祝福变得更强，甚至发生翻天覆地的变化——以一定的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>作为代价，不然搜集那些碎片有什么用？现在就开始吧。」
t_en: "Mmm. Mmm." Herta replies flippantly. "As the game master, I can make your Blessings stronger, or even make earth-shattering changes to them — at the price of paying <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. What's the point in collecting those otherwise? Now then, let's begin."

t_ch: 走近那个相框，去吧。试试新玩意。
t_en: Go get closer to that picture frame. Time to try something new.

t_ch: 获得一些宇宙碎片。
t_en: Obtain some Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 获得一个随机祝福
t_en: Obtain 1 random Blessing

t_ch: 什么也不做
t_en: Do nothing

t_ch: [用来买东西。]
t_en: "Buy something."

t_ch: [得到些好东西。]
t_en: "Get some good stuff."

t_ch: [你不需要。]
t_en: "You don't need it."

t_ch: 你看见一个男人，他大约三十岁，其貌不扬，上着一件白衬衫，下身是褐色的吊带裤。当他开口时，他的眼神四处游弋，像在躲闪：「呃，我想给这个游戏加点儿随机事件，那会很好玩…不过，似乎脑波读取器的稳定性有点问题。所以，呃，现在你碰到的事件会比较，呃，单调。我很抱歉。」
t_en: You see a man about thirty years old with an unremarkable appearance, wearing a white shirt and brown suspenders. His eyes wander while he speaks, as if avoiding something. "Uh, I wanted to add some random occurrences to this game to make it more fun... But I think the brainwave reader is on the fritz. So, uh, now the events you encounter will be a little more, uh, monotonous. Sorry about that."

t_ch: 「比如，」男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」
t_en: "Like," he stutters without looking at you, "like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the simulation currently doesn't have any way of converting them into content. So, you will just see the following..."

t_ch: 说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了<color=#dbc291ff>随机事件</color>。
t_en: After speaking, the man disappears, and a line of words materializes where he was standing: You have encountered a <color=#dbc291ff>random Occurrence</color>.

t_ch: 「呃，就是这么单调。」男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
t_en: "Uh, yeah, that's how monotonous." The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.

t_ch: 「希望很快就能修复。」男人诚恳地说，「我真的很想你玩得愉快，真的。呃，再次向你道歉。」
t_en: "Hopefully very soon," the man says earnestly. "I really want you to have a good time, really. Um, once again, I'm really sorry about that."

t_ch: 这个敌人的数据好像有点问题…它的能力和战法和你印象中的不一样。
t_en: There seems to be something wrong with this enemy's data... Its abilities and tactics are different from what you remember.

t_ch: 不能把现实的经验套用在这种敌人身上，换用新的打法吧。
t_en: You can't apply real-world experience to this kind of enemy. Let's switch up the rules of the game, then.

t_ch: 前面那个沉浸装置，它可以生成我之前说的「位面饰品」数据。
t_en: That immersion device in front can generate the Planar Ornament data that I mentioned before.

t_ch: 给你个沉浸器，去试试。每次生成「位面饰品」都需要沉浸器。
t_en: Here's an Immersifier. Go try it out. You need an Immersifier every time you generate Planar Ornaments.

t_ch: 你的手脚突然不听使唤。黑塔——「模拟宇宙」的最高权力者又冻结了你的行动权限，人偶没好气的声音在耳边响起：「你怎么不去打那个东西？」
t_en: You suddenly lose control of your limbs. Herta — the Simulated Universe's most powerful being — has revoked your permissions again, and the puppet's angry voice sounds in your ear: "Why didn't you hit that thing?"

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 「那个东西。」黑塔不耐烦地说，「就是你平时走在路上，会用球棒打破的玩意儿。你怎么不去打它了？没看见吗？」
t_en: "That thing," Herta says impatiently, "that's what you usually smash with a bat when you walk past it on the road. Why didn't you go and hit it? Can't you see it?"

t_ch: 「居然没看见…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「小小年纪，一点都不知道观察生活……」
t_en: "You didn't see it..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "You are so young, yet you have no idea how to be observant..."

t_ch: 「真势利…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」
t_en: "What a snob..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"

t_ch: 「『模拟宇宙』和外边不一样，可破坏物会掉落<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，很有用的。现在，回去把那玩意打了。」黑塔叹了口气，「白给你发钱，你就拿着！」
t_en: "The Simulated Universe is different from the real world. Destructible objects will drop useful <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>. Now, go back and hit that plaything." Herta sighed, "If something's free, just take it!"

t_ch: 你一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：「{NICKNAME}，」你听得出她在努力佯装正常，「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」
t_en: You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: "{NICKNAME}," she asks, trying to play it cool, "Have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"

t_ch: 「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」黑塔流畅地回答，「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的 <color=#dbc291ff>『位面饰品』</color>。」
t_en: "Ah, okay, I see. Got it," replies Herta fluidly, "I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. You can immerse yourself deeper now. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive <color=#dbc291ff>Planar Ornament</color>."

t_ch: 「只是个说法，不用在意。」
t_en: "It's just an expression, don't worry about it."

t_ch: 「很有用的纪念品。」
t_en: "A very useful souvenir."

t_ch: 「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」
t_en: "Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."

t_ch: 「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」
t_en: "The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I use Relic-cloning tech mastered from my Fragmentum research to extract this part out of all the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."

t_ch: 「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」她难得地笑了一声。
t_en: "That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll tell you more once the immersion function is ready to be used." She lets out a rare laugh.

t_ch: （黑塔宣称的升级…好像没什么区别？）
t_en: (Herta's so-called upgrades... seem to make no difference at all?)

t_ch: 寒气浮上背脊，一层烟雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，它来自「记忆」的星神浮黎，但这一次没有停留。星神好像没有注意到你，祂的消失与出现同样毫无征兆。
t_en: Cold air creeps up your back, and a layer of smoke covers your eyes — This is a familiar scene from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance, but this time THEY did not stop. The Aeon doesn't seem to notice you, and THEIR disappearance is just as mysterious as THEIR appearance.

t_ch: 继续…
t_en: Continue...

t_ch: 黑塔的声音适时响起：<color=#dbc291ff>「别灰心，这已经很好了，在你之前的测试者甚至得不到命途的回应。继续吧{NICKNAME}。」</color>听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。
t_en: You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. <color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be discouraged. You're already doing great. Previous testers never even got a response from the Paths. Keep going, {NICKNAME}."</color> Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.
